description: Joshua's personal skillset — agents and skills for recurring personal tasks.

skills.name: NYC Dance Weekly Briefing
skills.description: Weekly NYC dance music briefing — produces a Mon–Sun Notion page covering shows, news, and underground parties for Joshua Pollak.

skills.name: Weekly Monthly Recap Agent
skills.description: Interactive weekly + monthly recaps from JPOS Notion (Tasks + Interactions) with iMessage Q&A; nightly daily-interactions enrichment that fills in note-less Interactions via iMessage cleanup, entity resolution, and confirmation before write.

skills.name: Sage
skills.description: Personal assistant for Joshua Pollak. Current focus: weekly NYC dance music discovery briefing (artists, songs, labels, party series) published to Notion with a Telegram teaser.
